1905060.name: Fire Safety VR Training
1905060.description:
Fire Safety VR Training

Train your professional skills in Fire Safety VR Training safely and in full correspondence with international standards!
In the VR simulator you will have to immediately stop working and call the fire brigade by phone (indicating the address of the organization, name of the organization, fire origin point, last name, first name, patronymic, phone number), conduct evacuation according to the evacuation plan, turn on the manual fire alarm, follow the escape routes according to the signs and use a fire extinguisher in accordance with the operating rules.

The situation takes place in an office building.

Fire Safety VR Training was developed for professionals by professionals (including NEBOSH certified HSE). It is suitable for a wide variety of workers.

If you need extended corporate licensing for Fire Safety VR Training please contact us for the details.
1905060.supported_languages:
英语*, 西班牙语 - 西班牙*, 意大利语*, 孟加拉语*, 古吉拉特语*, 马来语*, 旁遮普语（古尔穆基语）*, 俄语*, 法语*, 德语*, 阿拉伯语*, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西*, 越南语*, 韩语*, 土耳其语*, 日语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
